sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62415" key="leontomu/rmhc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεοντο-μύρμηξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ηκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n62415.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">half-lion, half-ant</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
